def eligible_for_fitness_program(self) -> bool:
        allowed_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        allowed_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        allowed_employment_status = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        allowed_education = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        allowed_marital_status = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        allowed_religion = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        allowed_physical_activity_levels = ['low', 'moderate']

        if (self.gender.lower() in allowed_genders and
            self.race.lower() in allowed_races and
            self.employment_status.lower() in allowed_employment_status and
            self.education.lower() in allowed_education and
            self.marital_status.lower() in allowed_marital_status and
            self.religion.lower() in allowed_religion and
            self.physical_activity_level.lower() in allowed_physical_activity_levels):
            return True
        else:
            return False
